wallets_header: THOLA ISIKHWAMA SE-BITCOIN SAMAHHALA UKUZE WAMUKELE IZINKOKHELO ZE-BITCOIN
wallets_intro_1: Zonke izikhwama ze-Bitcoin ziyasebenzisana, ngakho amakhasimende akho angakukhokha nge-Bitcoin noma ngabe asebenzisa siphi isikhwama.
wallets_intro_3: Lezi yizikhwama ze-Bitcoin ezimsulwa ezivula zonke izinzuzo ze-Bitcoin: akukho baphakathi, izimali eziphansi, futhi akukho ukubuyiswa kwemali noma ukukhohliswa.
wallets_intro_5: Lezi zikuvumela ukushintshanisa noma iyiphi ingxenye ye-Bitcoin yakho ngamadola ngokushesha lapho ikhasimende likukhokha. Izimali zisaphansi kunanezinkokhelo zamakhadi esikweletu, kodwa ziphezulu kunanezinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin ezimsulwa.
wallets_intro_6: Zombili ziyizindlela ezinhle zokwamukela i-Bitcoin. Isikhwama esithile osisebenzisayo sizoncika ebukhulwini nohlobo lwebhizinisi lakho.
wallets_square_note: Ungamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin ngetheminali yakho ekhona ye-Square PoS noma ukuhlanganiswa kwesitolo saku-inthanethi. Akukaze kube lula kangaka ukwamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin.
